hero.title: Predict. Compete.
hero.subtitle: Join the ultimate World Cup prediction game. Pick match scores, compete with friends, and climb the leaderboard to become the ultimate football oracle.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple, fun, and competitive. Start predicting in minutes.

pickScores.title: Pick Your Scores
pickScores.description: Predict the exact score of every match before the opening whistle blows.

earnPoints.title: Earn Points
earnPoints.description: Get 3 points for exact scores and 1 point for correctly predicting the winner or a draw.

compete.title: Global Competition
compete.description: Test your knowledge against users worldwide and climb the global leaderboard.

joinLeague.title: Private Leagues
joinLeague.description: Create or join leagues with friends and family to compete for ultimate bragging rights.

matchLock.title: Prediction Lock
matchLock.description: Predictions lock 5 minutes before kick-off. Make sure to save your picks in time!

masterTheBracket.title: Master the Bracket
masterTheBracket.description: As the tournament progresses, fill out the knockout stages all the way to the final.

finalCta.title: Ready to Start Predicting?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of football fans competing to be the ultimate World Cup oracle.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your predictions

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join the competition and start predicting
